title: Perplexity：聯網文獻搜尋與實驗架構設計
prompt:
# Codex PPT Slide Image Prompt

## Canvas
{
  "type": "16:9 full-slide PowerPoint image",
  "language": "Chinese",
  "slide_number": 16,
  "render_slide_number": false
}

## Deck Goal
Optimize and rewrite the presentation to make it visual, premium, and easy to read, preserving original screenshots.

## Required Background
{
  "deck_context": {
    "source_summary": "Guide on using AI tools (LLMs, Search, NotebookLM, Data Analysis, Slide Design) to assist high school students in science projects and research.",
    "core_claim": "AI is an Intelligence Amplifier (IA) that enhances human capabilities in scientific inquiry.",
    "canonical_terms": [
      "IA (Intelligence Amplification)",
      "LLM (Large Language Model)",
      "NotebookLM",
      "Data Analysis",
      "Matplotlib",
      "Claude Artifacts"
    ]
  }
}

## Global Style
{
  "name": "清爽科技專業風",
  "visual_direction": "clean tech-blue modern educational presentation",
  "color_palette": "light-gray gradient background (#F8FAFC to #EFF6FF), tech-blue headers (#0B1B3D), dark gray body text, bright teal accents",
  "typography": "bold sans-serif traditional Chinese titles, readable dark gray body text"
}

## Style Reference Images To Inspect

- Style Reference 1: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0 AI輔助專題與科展/AI輔助專題研究＿麗山林獻升_教學簡報/origin_image/slide_11.png — approved sample slide style reference; match style only; do not copy layout or content

Inspect these images before generation to understand the approved deck style. Do not pass them to the image backend as input images unless this slide explicitly lists them under Input Images.

## Slide
{
  "number": 16,
  "title": "Perplexity：聯網文獻搜尋與實驗架構設計",
  "role": "concept explanation",
  "intent": null
}

## Text
{
  "title": "Perplexity：聯網文獻搜尋與實驗架構設計",
  "key_points": [
    "應用方式：輸入研究問題，直接進行學術文獻搜尋與摘要",
    "優點：即時生成附有引用的研究設計建議",
    "範例：搜尋特定植物萃取物的抑菌實驗步驟"
  ],
  "speaker_focus": null
}

## Style Reference Rule
Use the approved sample-slide style reference as visual guidance only. Match its palette, typography mood, density, texture, and overall visual identity. Do not copy its exact layout unless this slide's layout explicitly asks for it. For normal new slide generation, use the generate endpoint and express the inspected style through the prompt instead of attaching the sample as an edit input.

## Universal Constraints
- The final image itself must contain the title and key points.
- Render Chinese text exactly and legibly; avoid garbled characters.
- Keep the confirmed deck style consistent while varying layout by slide role.
- No watermark, unrelated logo, or extra slide number.

sample_generation_method.prompt_source: A high-quality 16:9 presentation slide based on Style A: 'Clean Tech Professional'. Layout: Balanced split-screen layout. Left 40% column: Contains the slide title in traditional Chinese '範例解析：ChatGPT 腦力激盪實作' in bold tech-blue (#0B1B3D). Below the title, there are three bullet points in readable dark gray. Right 60% column: The input image is displayed inside a beautiful card with rounded corners, a subtle light-gray border, and a soft, realistic drop shadow. Background: Minimalist light-gray gradient background.
sample_generation_method.approved_sample_path: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0 AI輔助專題與科展/AI輔助專題研究＿麗山林獻升_教學簡報/origin_image/slide_11.png
sample_generation_method.input_context_preparation: inspect style references before generation; pass strict input assets with edit --image only when a slide job lists input_images
sample_generation_method.handoff_rule: Subagents must use this same backend/tool/config; use generate for new slides unless the assigned job has strict input_images or is a repair.
